input.testCaseTitle: Rename the "Update" button to "Update to DAM Manager" in the DAM workflow
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-394 reported defect: Rename the "Update" button to "Update to DAM Manager" in the DAM workflow
input.errorMessage: Rename the "Update" button to "Update to DAM Manager" in the DAM workflow — see CPI ticket CPI-394 for repro context (no description in source corpus)

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: The DAM workflow action dropdown used the generic Update label instead of Update to DAM Manager. The action label was corrected for Product Manager, Product Head, and Marketing Manager users.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.92. Straightforward action-label UI defect.
